activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception applies and only origin verification activated
Country normalization special equivalences including China/Hong Kong
EU origin normalization with mixed origins allowed

consignor.certificate_value: Volvo Bus Corporation Bussgatan 1 50464, Borås Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: VOLVO BUS CORPORATION SE556197382601 SE-405 08 Göteborg Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' from certificate matches invoice issuer 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION'. Company name found in invoice header and address as per rule 4.1.0. Land 'Sweden' matches after normalization. No contradictory information found.

consignee.certificate_value: PT. INDOTRUCK UTAMA JL RAYA CAKUNG CILINCING KAV.3A SEMPER TIMUR JAKARTA UTARA 14130 Indonesia
consignee.invoice_value: PT. INDOTRUCK UTAMA Jl.Raya Cakung Cilincing Kav.3A 14130 JAKARTA Indonesia
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'PT. INDOTRUCK UTAMA' in certificate matches 'Buyer' and 'Ship-to' fields in invoice. Address and country 'Indonesia' align well with minor acceptable formatting differences.

goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'VOLVO B11R 6X2 AT' in certificate matches invoice 'VOLVO B11R 6X2'. Minor difference with 'AT' suffix is acceptable under normalisation rules. Number of units '25 UNITS' is also consistent.

quantity.invoice_value: Qty/Unit column: 1 PC each; Total weight [KG]: 199500
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity of 25 Units matches invoice detail showing 25 individual units each of 1 PC quantity. Total gross weight 199500 KG in certificate matches 'Total weight [KG]: 199500' in invoice. Quantity and weight align within allowed tolerances.

origin.motivation: Certificate indicates origin as 'European Community Sweden', and invoice shows 'Country of origin: SE', which matches Sweden (an EU member). EU-normalisation rules are applied and origin is verified.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points (Consignor, Consignee, Goods Description, Quantity, Origin) matched successfully following strict verification rules including LC exception and EU origin normalization.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter mellan certifikatet och fakturan stämmer överens. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuell handläggning.
